metadata.source: Wikipedia Japanese via KFTT corpus, tokenized with MeCab/UniDic
metadata.corpus: Word frequencies from MeCab tokenization of the KFTT corpus (443,849 Wikipedia Kyoto article sentences, 6,475,932 total tokens). Lemmatized to dictionary form via UniDic. Represents formal/encyclopedic written Japanese. Complements frequency-newspaper.json (kanji), frequency-subtitles.json (spoken media), and frequency-web.json (web text).
metadata.attribution: Frequency data derived from the KFTT corpus (https://www.phontron.com/kftt/, CC-BY-SA 3.0), which contains Japanese Wikipedia article sentences. Tokenized with MeCab (https://taku910.github.io/mecab/) using the UniDic dictionary.

field_notes.text: Lemma (dictionary form) as determined by MeCab/UniDic.
field_notes.rank: Rank by Wikipedia occurrence count. 1 = most frequent.
field_notes.count: Raw occurrence count in the KFTT Wikipedia corpus.
